title: 1st Place — MariTHON National Hackathon
description: Built and deployed an SOF extraction system for maritime workflows; reduced manual processing time by 50% and maintained 100% accuracy in production usage with Integrated Maritime Exchange.

title: Finalist — HackTheWinter National Hackathon
description: Developed an AI-driven dynamic credit limit optimization system using reinforcement learning, designed for real-time decisioning on high-throughput event streams.
